# chalk_datasource_databricks (Resource)

Manages a Chalk Databricks datasource integration.

**Required permissions:** `secrets.write`, `secrets.decrypt`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID that this datasource is scoped to.
- `name` (String) The name of the datasource integration.

### Optional

- `access_token` (Attributes) The Databricks access token (`DATABRICKS_TOKEN`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_token))
- `client_id` (Attributes) The OAuth client ID (`DATABRICKS_CLIENT_ID`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--client_id))
- `client_secret` (Attributes) The OAuth client secret (`DATABRICKS_CLIENT_SECRET`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--client_secret))
- `config` (Attributes Map) Additional configuration for the datasource. Must not contain keys managed by the named attributes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `database` (Attributes) The database to use (`DATABRICKS_DATABASE`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--database))
- `host` (Attributes) The Databricks server hostname (`DATABRICKS_HOST`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--host))
- `http_path` (Attributes) The HTTP path for Databricks SQL endpoint (`DATABRICKS_HTTP_PATH`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--http_path))
- `port` (Attributes) The Databricks port (`DATABRICKS_PORT`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--port))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the datasource integration.

<a id="nestedatt--access_token"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_token`

Optional:

- `literal` (String, Sensitive) A plain-text value.
- `secret_id` (String) The ID of an existing Chalk secret.
